rawContent: {"stage":"build","insights":[{"kind":"gotcha","text":"The capitalize (sentence-case) utility already exists in src/utils/cap.ts — the task spec didn't reflect existing code.","scope":"src/utils"},{"kind":"convention","text":"Two distinct capitalize functions exist: capitalize (sentence-case) in cap.ts, capitalizeWords (title-case) in capitalize-words.ts.","scope":"src/utils"}]}
